            [32m"- For simple, directed codebase searches (project structure, specific files/classes/functions), use the listFiles tool. If you pass 'true' for the recursive parameter, it will list files recursively. Use globFiles when you need to match files by pattern.\n"[39m +

            [32m'- You are only allowed to ask the user questions using the askFollowupQuestion tool. Use this tool only when you need additional details to complete a task, and be sure to use a clear and concise question that will help you move forward with the task. For example, if the user mentions a file that may be in an outside directory like the Desktop, you should use the listFiles tool to list the files in the Desktop and check if the file they are talking about is there, rather than asking the user to provide the file path themselves.\n'[39m +

            },
            {
              type: [32m'text'[39m,
              text: [32m'# Real-time Collaborative Whiteboard with RedwoodSDK\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'## Background\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'A freshly scaffolded RedwoodSDK (rwsdk) project lives at `/home/user/myproject` with all npm dependencies pre-installed. Turn it into a real-time collaborative whiteboard that synchronizes drawing strokes across every browser viewing the same `boardId`, running locally on Vite + miniflare.\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'## Requirements\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'* A page at `/board/:boardId` that shows a clickable drawing surface (a `<canvas>` element or equivalent) and a **Clear** button.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Each click on the drawing surface adds a coloured dot at the clicked coordinates. The colour of new dots is determined by your implementation (it must be deterministic for the page; any valid CSS colour string is acceptable as long as it round-trips through the JSON API unchanged).\n'[39m +
                [32m'* The list of dots is shared in real time across every browser/tab viewing the same `boardId` using `useSyncedState` from `rwsdk/use-synced-state/client`.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Clicking **Clear** empties the shared dot list for that board (for every connected client).\n'[39m +
                [32m'* A JSON endpoint at `GET /api/board/:boardId` returns the current dot list for that board.\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'## Implementation Hints\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m"* Use rwsdk's realtime synced state primitives (`useSyncedState` on the client, `SyncedStateServer` + `syncedStateRoutes` on the worker, plus the matching Durable Object binding and `new_sqlite_classes` migration in `wrangler.jsonc`).\n"[39m +
                [32m'* Scope state per board via the third (room ID) argument to `useSyncedState`, derived from the URL parameter `:boardId`.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* rwsdk is server-first: the `Document` must include `<script type="module" src="/src/client.tsx"></script>` so client components are hydrated and the canvas click handler runs.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* To expose the current dot list over a plain HTTP `GET /api/board/:boardId` endpoint, the worker needs a way to observe synced state updates from outside the React tree. The `SyncedStateServer` exposes server-side hooks for that purpose; consult the rwsdk Realtime docs.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Treat `:boardId` as an arbitrary opaque string; do not hardcode allowed board IDs.\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'## Acceptance Criteria\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Project path: `/home/user/myproject`\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Start command: `cd /home/user/myproject && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173`\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Port: `5173`\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Routes:\n'[39m +
                [32m'  * `GET /board/:boardId`: Returns `200 OK` HTML containing the whiteboard UI. The page must render:\n'[39m +
                [32m'    * A clickable drawing surface (a `<canvas>` element, or another visible element clearly used for drawing).\n'[39m +
                [32m'    * A clickable element whose visible text contains the word `Clear`.\n'[39m +
                [32m'  * `GET /api/board/:boardId`: Returns `200 OK` with `Content-Type` including `application/json` and a body of shape:\n'[39m +
                [32m'    ```json\n'[39m +
                [32m'    { "dots": [ { "x": number, "y": number, "color": string } ] }\n'[39m +
                [32m'    ```\n'[39m +
                [32m'    The `dots` array must reflect the latest synchronized state for that board, including dots added from any browser tab.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Real-time behaviour: a click on the drawing surface in one tab viewing `/board/<id>` must add a dot that becomes visible in every other tab viewing the same `/board/<id>` without a manual page refresh, within a few seconds.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Clear semantics: clicking the **Clear** button on `/board/<id>` must remove every dot for that board for every connected client, and `GET /api/board/<id>` must subsequently return `{ "dots": [] }`.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Per-board isolation: different `:boardId` values must hold independent dot lists; adding or clearing dots on one board must not affect any other board.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* Verifiers will derive the board ID from the `ZEALT_RUN_ID` environment variable (e.g., `${ZEALT_RUN_ID}-board`). Your implementation must accept arbitrary board IDs via the URL parameter without any pre-registration.\n'[39m +
                [32m'* The `Document` must include a `<script type="module" src="/src/client.tsx">` tag for client hydration. The Durable Object class `SyncedStateServer` must be exported from the worker entry, bound in `wrangler.jsonc`, and migrated via a `new_sqlite_classes` entry.'[39m
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          role: [32m'assistant'[39m,
          content: [
            {

                    [32m'export declare const useSyncedState: <T>(initialValue: T, key: string, roomId?: string | undefined) => [T, Setter<T>];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export {};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'---\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import type { RequestInfo } from "../runtime/requestInfo/types";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import { SyncedStateServer } from "./SyncedStateServer.mjs";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export { SyncedStateServer };\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type SyncedStateRouteOptions = {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    basePath?: string;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    durableObjectName?: string;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'/**\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Registers routes that forward sync state requests to the configured Durable Object namespace.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @param getNamespace Function that returns the Durable Object namespace from the Worker env.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @param options Optional overrides for base path and object name.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @returns Router entries for the sync state API.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' */\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare const syncedStateRoutes: (getNamespace: (env: Cloudflare.Env) => DurableObjectNamespace<SyncedStateServer>, options?: SyncedStateRouteOptions) => import("../runtime/lib/router.js").RouteDefinition<`/${string}`, RequestInfo<any, import("../runtime/requestInfo/types").DefaultAppContext>>[];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'---\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import type { RpcStub } from "capnweb";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import { DurableObject } from "cloudflare:workers";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import type { RequestInfo } from "../runtime/requestInfo/types";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type SyncedStateValue = unknown;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type OnSetHandler = (key: string, value: SyncedStateValue, stub: DurableObjectStub<SyncedStateServer>) => void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type OnGetHandler = (key: string, value: SyncedStateValue | undefined, stub: DurableObjectStub<SyncedStateServer>) => void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type OnKeyHandler = (key: string, stub: DurableObjectStub<SyncedStateServer>) => Promise<string>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type OnRoomHandler = (roomId: string | undefined, requestInfo: RequestInfo | null) => Promise<string>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type OnSubscribeHandler = (key: string, stub: DurableObjectStub<SyncedStateServer>) => void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type OnUnsubscribeHandler = (key: string, stub: DurableObjectStub<SyncedStateServer>) => void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'/**\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Durable Object that keeps shared state for multiple clients and notifies subscribers.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' */\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare class SyncedStateServer extends DurableObject {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    #private;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static registerKeyHandler(handler: OnKeyHandler | null): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static getKeyHandler(): OnKeyHandler | null;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static registerRoomHandler(handler: OnRoomHandler | null): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static getRoomHandler(): OnRoomHandler | null;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static registerNamespace(namespace: DurableObjectNamespace<SyncedStateServer>, durableObjectName?: string): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static getNamespace(): DurableObjectNamespace<SyncedStateServer> | null;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static getDurableObjectName(): string;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    setStub(stub: DurableObjectStub<SyncedStateServer>): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static registerSetStateHandler(handler: OnSetHandler | null): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static registerGetStateHandler(handler: OnGetHandler | null): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static registerSubscribeHandler(handler: OnSubscribeHandler | null): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static registerUnsubscribeHandler(handler: OnUnsubscribeHandler | null): void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static getSubscribeHandler(): OnSubscribeHandler | null;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    static getUnsubscribeHandler(): OnUnsubscribeHandler | null;\r\n'[39m +

                    [32m'    setState(value: SyncedStateValue, key: string): void;\r\n'[39m +

                    [32m'}\r\n'[39m +

                  output: [32m'export const syncedStateRoutes = (getNamespace, options = {}) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    const basePath = options.basePath ?? DEFAULT_SYNCED_STATE_PATH;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    const durableObjectName = options.durableObjectName ?? DEFAULT_SYNC_STATE_NAME;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    const forwardRequest = async (request, requestInfo) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        const namespace = getNamespace(env);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        // Register the namespace and DO name so handlers can access it\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        SyncedStateServer.registerNamespace(namespace, durableObjectName);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        const keyHandler = SyncedStateServer.getKeyHandler();\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        const roomHandler = SyncedStateServer.getRoomHandler();\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        // Get the room ID from the URL parameter, or undefined if not present\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        const idParam = requestInfo.params?.id;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        // Resolve the room name using the roomHandler if present, otherwise use the param or default\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        let resolvedRoomName;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        if (roomHandler) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            resolvedRoomName = await runWithRequestInfo(requestInfo, async () => await roomHandler(idParam, requestInfo));\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        else {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            resolvedRoomName = idParam ?? durableObjectName;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        if (!keyHandler) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            const id = namespace.idFromName(resolvedRoomName);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m''[39m,
                  isTruncated: [33mfalse[39m

                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'import { Document } from "@/app/document";\n'[39m +
                  [32m'import { setCommonHeaders } from "@/app/headers";\n'[39m +
                  [32m'import { Board } from "@/app/pages/board";\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'export { SyncedStateServer };\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'export type AppContext = {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  env: {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    SYNCED_STATE: DurableObjectNamespace<SyncedStateServer>;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  };\n'[39m +
                  [32m'};\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'export default defineApp<AppContext>([\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  setCommonHeaders(),\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  ({ ctx }) => {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    // setup ctx here\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    ctx;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  },\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  ...syncedStateRoutes((env) => env.SYNCED_STATE),\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  route("/api/board/:boardId", async ({ req, env }) => {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const boardId = req.params.boardId;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const id = env.SYNCED_STATE.idFromName(boardId);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const stub = env.SYNCED_STATE.get(id);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const dots = await stub.getState("dots") || [];\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    return Response.json({ dots });\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  }),\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  render(Document, [\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    route("/board/:boardId", Board)\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  ]),\n'[39m +
                  [32m']);\n'[39m +
                  [32m''[39m

                    [32m'              href="https://docs.rwsdk.com/core/hosting/"\r\n'[39m +

                    [32m'              rel="noreferrer"\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'              className={styles.link}\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            >\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'              Cloudflare deployment guide\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            </a>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            .\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'          </p>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        </section>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'      </main>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    </div>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'  );\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'const Copy = ({ textToCopy }: { textToCopy: string }) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'  const handleCopy = () => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    navigator.clipboard.writeText(textToCopy).then(() => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'      setCopied(true);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'      setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'  };\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'  return (\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    <button onClick={handleCopy} className={styles.copyButton}>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'      {copied ? "Copied!" : "Copy"}\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    </button>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'  );\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m''[39m,
                  isTruncated: [33mfalse[39m
                }
              },
              providerOptions: {
                vertex: {
                  thoughtSignature: [32m''[39m
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          role: [32m'assistant'[39m,
          content: [
            {
              type: [32m'reasoning'[39m,
              text: [32m'**Considering Client Component Integration**\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m"I'm contemplating the implications of declaring the `Board` component as a client component, particularly regarding its ability to receive route `params`. My current understanding is that route components typically function as server components to access such parameters directly, so I need to investigate this further to ensure seamless functionality.\n"[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'**Investigating Client Component Param Access**\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m'I\'m examining if `Board`, declared with `"use client";`, can directly receive router `params`. My initial thought was that route components, often server components, handle this. I\'m now exploring how a client component in `src/app/pages/board.tsx` might access these parameters, especially since it\'s expected to receive them.\n'[39m +
                [32m'\n'[39m +
                [32m''[39m
            },
            {
              type: [32m'tool-call'[39m,
              toolCallId: [32m'OvobsPUBWrrp14AV'[39m,
              toolName: [32m'writeToFile'[39m,
              input: {
                path: [32m'/home/user/myproject/src/app/pages/board.tsx'[39m,
                content: [32m'"use client";\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'import React, { useRef, useEffect } from "react";\n'[39m +
                  [32m'import { useSyncedState } from "rwsdk/use-synced-state/client";\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'export const Board = ({ params }: { params: { boardId: string } }) => {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  const boardId = params.boardId;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  const [dots, setDots] = useSyncedState<{ x: number, y: number, color: string }[]>([], "dots", boardId);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  useEffect(() => {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    if (!canvas) return;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    if (!ctx) return;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    dots.forEach(dot => {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      ctx.fillStyle = dot.color;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      ctx.beginPath();\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      ctx.arc(dot.x, dot.y, 5, 0, 2 * Math.PI);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      ctx.fill();\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    });\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  }, [dots]);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  const handleCanvasClick = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement>) => {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    if (!canvas) return;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const y = e.clientY - rect.top;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    \n'[39m +
                  [32m'    setDots(prev => [...prev, { x, y, color: "red" }]);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  };\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  const handleClear = () => {\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    setDots([]);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  };\n'[39m +
                  [32m'\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  return (\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    <div>\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      <h1>Board {boardId}</h1>\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      <button onClick={handleClear}>Clear</button>\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      <canvas\n'[39m +
                  [32m'        ref={canvasRef}\n'[39m +
                  [32m'        width={800}\n'[39m +
                  [32m'        height={600}\n'[39m +
                  [32m'        style={{ border: "1px solid black", display: "block", marginTop: "10px" }}\n'[39m +
                  [32m'        onClick={handleCanvasClick}\n'[39m +
                  [32m'      />\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    </div>\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  );\n'[39m +
                  [32m'};\n'[39m +
                  [32m''[39m
              },
              providerOptions: {
                vertex: {
                  thoughtSignature: [32m''[39m
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          role: [32m'tool'[39m,
          content: [
            {
              type: [32m'tool-result'[39m,
              toolCallId: [32m'OvobsPUBWrrp14AV'[39m,

        },
        {
          role: [32m'tool'[39m,
          content: [
            {
              type: [32m'tool-result'[39m,
              toolCallId: [32m'tR2cEskjddIBPrmW'[39m,
              toolName: [32m'executeCommand'[39m,
              output: {
                type: [32m'json'[39m,
                value: {
                  output: [32m'import React from "react";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import { RequestInfo } from "../requestInfo/types";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import type { DocumentProps, LayoutProps } from "./types.js";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type MaybePromise<T> = T | Promise<T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type BivariantRouteHandler<T extends RequestInfo, R> = {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    bivarianceHack(requestInfo: T): R;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'}["bivarianceHack"];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type RouteMiddleware<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = BivariantRouteHandler<T, MaybePromise<React.JSX.Element | Response | void>>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type ExceptHandler<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    __rwExcept: true;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    handler: (error: unknown, requestInfo: T) => MaybePromise<React.JSX.Element | Response | void>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    pathPattern?: string;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type RouteFunction<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = BivariantRouteHandler<T, MaybePromise<Response>>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type RouteComponent<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = BivariantRouteHandler<T, MaybePromise<React.JSX.Element | Response | void>>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type RouteHandler<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = RouteFunction<T> | RouteComponent<T> | readonly [...RouteMiddleware<T>[], RouteFunction<T> | RouteComponent<T>];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'declare const METHOD_VERBS: readonly ["delete", "get", "head", "patch", "post", "put"];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type MethodVerb = (typeof METHOD_VERBS)[number];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type MethodHandlers<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    [K in MethodVerb]?: RouteHandler<T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'} & {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    config?: {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        disable405?: true;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        disableOptions?: true;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    };\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    custom?: {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        [method: string]: RouteHandler<T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    };\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type Route<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = RouteMiddleware<T> | RouteDefinition<string, T> | ExceptHandler<T> | readonly Route<T>[];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type NormalizedRouteDefinition<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    path: string;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    handler: RouteHandler<T> | MethodHandlers<T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    layouts?: React.FC<LayoutProps<T>>[];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export type RouteDefinition<Path extends string = string, T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo> = NormalizedRouteDefinition<T> & {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    readonly __rwPath?: Path;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type TrimTrailingSlash<S extends string> = S extends `${infer Head}/` ? TrimTrailingSlash<Head> : S;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type TrimLeadingSlash<S extends string> = S extends `/${infer Rest}` ? TrimLeadingSlash<Rest> : S;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type NormalizePrefix<Prefix extends string> = TrimTrailingSlash<TrimLeadingSlash<Prefix>> extends "" ? "" : `/${TrimTrailingSlash<TrimLeadingSlash<Prefix>>}`;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type NormalizePath<Path extends string> = TrimTrailingSlash<Path> extends "/" ? "/" : `/${TrimTrailingSlash<TrimLeadingSlash<Path>>}`;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type JoinPaths<Prefix extends string, Path extends string> = NormalizePrefix<Prefix> extends "" ? NormalizePath<Path> : Path extends "/" ? NormalizePrefix<Prefix> : `${NormalizePrefix<Prefix>}${NormalizePath<Path>}`;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type PrefixedRouteValue<Prefix extends string, Value> = Value extends RouteDefinition<infer Path, infer Req> ? RouteDefinition<JoinPaths<Prefix, Path>, Req> : Value extends ExceptHandler<any> ? Value : Value extends readonly Route<any>[] ? PrefixedRouteArray<Prefix, Value> : Value;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type PrefixedRouteArray<Prefix extends string, Routes extends readonly Route<any>[]> = Routes extends readonly [] ? [] : Routes extends readonly [infer Head, ...infer Tail] ? readonly [\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    PrefixedRouteValue<Prefix, Head>,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    ...PrefixedRouteArray<Prefix, Tail extends readonly Route<any>[] ? Tail : []>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'] : ReadonlyArray<PrefixedRouteValue<Prefix, Routes[number]>>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function matchPath<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo>(routePath: string, requestPath: string): T["params"] | null;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function defineRoutes<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo>(routes: readonly Route<T>[]): {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    routes: Route<T>[];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    handle: ({ request, renderPage, getRequestInfo, onError, runWithRequestInfoOverrides, rscActionHandler, }: {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        request: Request;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        renderPage: (requestInfo: T, Page: React.FC, onError: (error: unknown) => void) => Promise<Response>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        getRequestInfo: () => T;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        onError: (error: unknown) => void;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        runWithRequestInfoOverrides: <Result>(overrides: Partial<T>, fn: () => Promise<Result>) => Promise<Result>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        rscActionHandler: (request: Request) => Promise<unknown>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    }) => Response | Promise<Response>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'/**\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Defines a route handler for a path pattern.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Supports three types of path patterns:\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * - Static: /about, /contact\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * - Parameters: /users/:id, /posts/:postId/edit\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * - Wildcards: /files/\\*, /api/\\*\\/download\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Static route\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * route("/about", () => <AboutPage />)\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Route with parameters\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * route("/users/:id", ({ params }) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   return <UserProfile userId={params.id} />\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * })\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Route with wildcards\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * route("/files/*", ({ params }) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   const filePath = params.$0\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   return <FileViewer path={filePath} />\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * })\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Method-based routing\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * route("/api/users", {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   get: () => Response.json(users),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   post: ({ request }) => Response.json({ status: "created" }, { status: 201 }),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   delete: () => new Response(null, { status: 204 }),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * })\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Route with middleware array\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * route("/admin", [isAuthenticated, isAdmin, () => <AdminDashboard />])\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' */\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function route<Path extends string, T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo>(path: Path, handler: RouteHandler<T> | MethodHandlers<T>): RouteDefinition<NormalizePath<Path>, T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'/**\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Defines a route handler for the root path "/".\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Homepage\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * index(() => <HomePage />)\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // With middleware\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * index([logRequest, () => <HomePage />])\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' */\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function index<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo>(handler: RouteHandler<T>): RouteDefinition<"/", T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'/**\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Defines an error handler that catches errors from routes, middleware, and RSC actions.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Global error handler\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * except((error, requestInfo) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   console.error(error);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   return new Response("Internal Server Error", { status: 500 });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * })\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Error handler that returns a React component\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * except((error) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   return <ErrorPage error={error} />;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * })\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' */\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function except<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo>(handler: (error: unknown, requestInfo: T) => MaybePromise<React.JSX.Element | Response | void>): ExceptHandler<T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function prefix<Prefix extends string, T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo, Routes extends readonly Route<T>[] = readonly Route<T>[]>(prefixPath: Prefix, routes: Routes): PrefixedRouteArray<Prefix, Routes>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare const wrapHandlerToThrowResponses: <T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo>(handler: RouteFunction<T> | RouteComponent<T>) => RouteHandler<T>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'/**\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Wraps routes with a layout component.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Define a layout component\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * function BlogLayout({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   return (\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *     <div>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *       <nav>Blog Navigation</nav>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *       <main>{children}</main>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *     </div>\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   )\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Apply layout to routes\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * const blogRoutes = layout(BlogLayout, [\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   route("/", () => <BlogIndex />),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   route("/post/:id", ({ params }) => <BlogPost id={params.id} />),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * ])\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' */\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function layout<TLayout extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo, Routes extends readonly Route<any>[] = readonly Route<any>[]>(LayoutComponent: React.FC<LayoutProps<TLayout>>, routes: Routes): Routes;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'/**\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * Wraps routes with a Document component and configures rendering options.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m" * @param options.rscPayload - Toggle the RSC payload that's appended to the Document. Disabling this will mean that interactivity no longer works.\r\n"[39m +
                    [32m' * @param options.ssr - Disable sever side rendering for all these routes. This only allow client side rendering, which requires `rscPayload` to be enabled.\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // Basic usage\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * defineApp([\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   render(Document, [\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *     route("/", () => <HomePage />),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *     route("/about", () => <AboutPage />),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   ]),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * ])\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * @example\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * // With custom rendering options\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * render(Document, [\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   route("/", () => <HomePage />),\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * ], {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   rscPayload: true,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' *   ssr: true,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' * })\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m' */\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'type RenderedRoutes<T extends RequestInfo, Routes extends readonly Route<T>[]> = readonly [RouteMiddleware<T>, ...Routes];\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare function render<T extends RequestInfo = RequestInfo, Routes extends readonly Route<T>[] = readonly Route<T>[]>(Document: React.FC<DocumentProps<T>>, routes: Routes, options?: {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    rscPayload?: boolean;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    ssr?: boolean;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'}): RenderedRoutes<T, Routes>;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export declare const isClientReference: (value: any) => boolean;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export {};\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m''[39m,
                  isTruncated: [33mfalse[39m

                type: [32m'json'[39m,

                  output: [32m'import { defineRoutes } from "./lib/router";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'import { generateNonce } from "./lib/utils";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export * from "./requestInfo/types";\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'export const defineApp = (routes, options = {}) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    const router = defineRoutes(routes);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    const rscActionHandler = createRscActionHandler({\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        allowedOrigins: options.allowedOrigins,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'    return {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        __rwRoutes: routes,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'        fetch: async (request, env, cf) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            globalThis.__webpack_require__ = ssrWebpackRequire;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            // context(justinvdm, 17 Mar 2026): Strip the Vite base path from the\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            // request URL so that routes defined as "/" match requests to "/app/"\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m"            // when base: '/app/' is configured. Vite injects BASE_URL automatically.\r\n"[39m +
                    [32m'            const base = import.meta.env.BASE_URL;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            if (base && base !== "/") {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const url = new URL(request.url);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                if (url.pathname.startsWith(base)) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    url.pathname = "/" + url.pathname.slice(base.length);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    request = new Request(url.toString(), request);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            // context(justinvdm, 5 Feb 2025): Serve assets requests using the assets service binding\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            // todo(justinvdm, 5 Feb 2025): Find a way to avoid this so asset requests are served directly\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            // rather than first needing to go through the worker\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            if (request.url.includes("/assets/")) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const url = new URL(request.url);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                url.pathname = url.pathname.slice("/assets/".length);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                return env.ASSETS.fetch(new Request(url.toString(), request));\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            else if (import.meta.env.VITE_IS_DEV_SERVER &&\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                new URL(request.url).pathname === "/__worker-run") {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const expectedToken = import.meta.env\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    .VITE_RWSDK_WORKER_RUN_TOKEN;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const requestToken = request.headers.get("x-rwsdk-worker-run-token");\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                if (!expectedToken || expectedToken !== requestToken) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    return new Response("Forbidden", { status: 403 });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const url = new URL(request.url);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const scriptPath = url.searchParams.get("script");\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                if (!scriptPath) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m`                    return new Response("Missing 'script' query parameter", {\r\n`[39m +
                    [32m'                        status: 400,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                try {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    const scriptModule = await import(/* @vite-ignore */ scriptPath);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    if (scriptModule.default) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        await scriptModule.default(request, env, cf);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    return new Response("Script executed successfully");\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                catch (e) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    console.error(`Error executing script: ${scriptPath}\\n\\n${e.stack}`);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    return new Response(`Error executing script: ${e.message}`, {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        status: 500,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            }\r\n'[39m +

                    [32m'                request.url.includes("/__vite_preamble__")) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m`                return new Response('import RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh"; RefreshRuntime.injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$RefreshSig$ = () => (type) => type; window.__vite_plugin_react_preamble_installed__ = true;', {\r\n`[39m +
                    [32m'                    headers: {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        "content-type": "text/javascript",\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    },\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'            try {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const url = new URL(request.url);\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                let path = url.pathname;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'--\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    params: {},\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    ctx: {},\r\n'[39m +

                    [32m'                    let pageElement;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    if (isClientReference(Page)) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        const { ctx, params } = requestInfo; // context(justinvdm, 25 Feb 2025): If the page is a client reference, we need to avoid passing\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m"                        // down props the client shouldn't get (e.g. env). For safety, we pick the allowed props explicitly.\r\n"[39m +
                    [32m'                        pageElement = _jsx(Page, { ctx: ctx, params: params });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    else {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        pageElement = _jsx(Page, { ...requestInfo });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    return pageElement;\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                };\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                const renderPage = async (requestInfo, Page, _onError) => {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    if (isClientReference(requestInfo.rw.Document)) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        if (import.meta.env.DEV) {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                            console.error("Document cannot be a client component");\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        return new Response(null, {\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                            status: 500,\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                        });\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    }\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    // context(justinvdm, 2026-03-17): Capture rendering errors so the\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    // router can throw them and route to except handlers. We store the\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m'                    // error on rw.renderError instead of throwing from renderPage, because\r\n'[39m +
                    [32m"                    // throwing mid-render corrupts React's internal RSC stream state\r\n"[39m +
                    [32m''[39m,

                  [32m'    const boardId = params.boardId;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const namespace = (env as any).SYNCED_STATE;\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const id = namespace.idFromName(boardId);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const stub = namespace.get(id);\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    const dots = (await stub.getState("dots")) || [];\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    return Response.json({ dots });\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  }),\n'[39m +
                  [32m'  render(Document, [\n'[39m +
                  [32m'    route("/board/:boardId", ({ params }) => <Board params={params as {boardId: string}} />)\n'[39m +
